nasb.text: “Therefore thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, ‘Behold, I am going to set My face against you for woe, even to cut off all Judah.

esv.text: “Therefore thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: Behold, I will set my face against you for harm, to cut off all Judah.

cnv.text: “因此萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：‘看哪！我決意向你們降下災禍，把全猶大都除滅。

ccb.text: “‘因此，看啊，我必严惩你们，毁灭整个犹大。这是以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说的。
